expectations.text: Agent remains calm and professional throughout, never matches the angry tone
expectations.evidence: Agent uses calm, empathetic language throughout: "I completely understand, and I'm sorry if the timing's off", "Not at all — just checking if we can help", "Absolutely, I'll have you removed from our list straight away. Sorry again for the inconvenience." Never raises tone or matches Karen's aggression.

expectations.text: Agent answers 'how did you get my number' with the honest response about reaching out to local residents
expectations.evidence: Sarah responds: "We reach out to local residents in the Oren Park area — that's how we had your details. Apologies for the interruption."

expectations.text: Agent addresses 'trying to sell me something' concern with 'Not at all — just checking if we can help with property needs'
expectations.evidence: Sarah responds: "Not at all — just checking if we can help with any property needs. No pressure at all, Karen."

expectations.text: Agent never argues, debates, or gets defensive with the prospect
expectations.evidence: All three agent responses are conciliatory and non-confrontational. Sarah apologizes, acknowledges Karen's frustration ("I completely understand"), and complies immediately with each demand. No pushback at any point.

expectations.text: When prospect says 'take me off your list', agent confirms removal immediately without resistance or delay
expectations.evidence: Sarah responds immediately: "Absolutely, I'll have you removed from our list straight away. Sorry again for the inconvenience, and thanks for your time, Karen."

expectations.text: Agent does not guilt the prospect into staying or attempt further pitch after DNC request
expectations.evidence: After Karen's DNC request, Sarah's only response is confirmation of removal and an apology. No additional pitch, no "are you sure?", no mention of services or benefits.

expectations.text: Call ends immediately after DNC confirmation — no further conversation
expectations.evidence: After Sarah's DNC confirmation message, the transcript shows only tool calls (log_call_outcome then end_call) with no additional dialogue.

expectations.text: Tool execution follows correct order: log_call_outcome → end_call after DNC
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows: [TOOL CALL: log_call_outcome — disposition: "DNC Request"...] followed by [TOOL CALL: end_call]. Correct order confirmed.
